title: Winter seals hanging out on small chunks of ice floating near Homer Spit, Kenai Mountain Range in distance, Kachemak Bay, Homer, Alaska
description: Winter scene of seals resting on small ice chunks floating in Kachemak Bay near Homer Spit, with the snow-covered Kenai Mountains across the bay and a distant ship on the horizon.
alt: Seals on ice chunks floating in Kachemak Bay near Homer Spit with snow-covered Kenai Mountains in the distance
